Good value for the business district; the airport shuttle was a real bonus.
A solid mid-range option — friendly staff, clean rooms, slightly dated décor.
Sustainable practices throughout — solar water heating, refillable amenities, and organic breakfast options.

hotel_world_42_20260423_084305_0208.description: The University District Hotel is a upscale hotel located in University District, Aeloria. Facilities include a bar, daily breakfast, a fitness centre and the property scores well for neighbourhood access. Airport shuttle service is available.

hotel_world_42_20260423_084305_0209.name: Hotel Ael5

reviews.text: We were placed next to a noisy HVAC unit with no offer to move despite a half-empty hotel.
Inconsistent housekeeping — bed made but bathroom not cleaned on two of our four days.
The infinity pool overlooking the city skyline made this stay truly memorable.
The most attentive service I have ever experienced — they remembered my name and preferences every day.
Sustainable practices throughout — solar water heating, refillable amenities, and organic breakfast options.

hotel_world_42_20260423_084305_0209.description: Hotel Ael5 is a comfortable mid-range hotel located in University District, Aeloria. Facilities include a full-service spa, daily breakfast and the property scores well for neighbourhood access.

hotel_world_42_20260423_084305_0210.name: The Aeloria Plaza

reviews.text: Checked in at 3 pm only to find the room had not been cleaned from the previous guest.
Charged for the minibar despite not using it; disputing the charge took three phone calls.
The spa and pool made this a genuinely restorative trip; room service was fast and delicious.
Acceptable for the price point; location near the station made early departures easy.
Good value for the business district; the airport shuttle was a real bonus.

hotel_world_42_20260423_084305_0210.description: The Aeloria Plaza is a comfortable mid-range hotel located in University District, Aeloria. Facilities include an outdoor pool, daily breakfast, a fitness centre and the property scores well for neighbourhood access.
